title: codonyat pipeline parameters
description: JSON schema for codonyat Nextflow pipeline parameters.

input.description: Samplesheet CSV containing sample_id, fastq_1, fastq_2 columns.

reference.description: Reference FASTA with protein coordinate annotations in the header.

amplicons.description: Amplicon definitions TSV used for codon-aware calling.

protein.description: Target protein name for amino acid variant calling.

outdir.description: Directory where pipeline outputs are written.

skip_fastqc.description: Skip FastQC on raw and trimmed reads.

bowtie2_args.description: Additional command-line arguments passed to bowtie2.

fastp_args.description: Additional command-line arguments passed to fastp.

ratio_upper.description: Upper strand-ratio bound passed to codonyat.

ratio_lower.description: Lower strand-ratio bound passed to codonyat.

entropy_threshold.description: Minimum Shannon entropy required to flag diversity.

docker_image.description: Docker image URI for the pipeline (default: codonyat:latest; override for Docker Hub builds)

aws_region.description: AWS region used by the Batch executor profile.

aws_batch_queue.description: AWS Batch queue name to submit tasks to.

aws_workdir.description: S3 work directory required for AWS Batch (for example s3://bucket/work).

aws_outdir.description: S3 output directory override for cloud runs (for example s3://bucket/results).

aws_container.description: Container image URI reachable by AWS Batch workers (typically ECR).
